summary: Iteration 247 — Accounting Transactions (Phase 1) verified end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases pass — list+summary shape, direction/search/status filters, Zoho /sync graceful 400 (Zoho not connected), PATCH /tags on DEBIT (status→tagged with expense_type/expense_category/cost_center/payment_source masters + vendor and persistence verified via GET), apply-account on CREDIT reduces account.outstanding_balance by exactly ₹50000, re-apply→400, unapply restores balance, apply-account on DEBIT→400, proof upload/download/delete (with content bytes round-trip and 404 after soft delete), unique index uniq_zoho_txn enforced (verified DuplicateKeyError on (tenant_id, zoho_org_id, zoho_transaction_id)). Frontend: /accounting/transactions loads, both seed rows visible (Money In ₹50,000 / Money Out ₹12,500 with arrow + colour), tab counts Untagged 2 / Tagged 0 / All 2. DEBIT detail panel shows Expense Tags + Vendor + Save Tags; CREDIT detail shows Account Search + payment_proof/invoice_proof upload slots. Save Tags POSTs and returns 200 with 'Tags saved' toast. Sync button shows 'Zoho Books is not connected for this tenant…' error toast (graceful). Two UI observations to flag (below).

integration_issues.issue: Typing 'a' into [data-testid=account-search] returned 0 results in the dropdown ([data-testid^=account-opt-] count = 0), even though /api/accounts has 12 accounts in this tenant. Likely the FE search endpoint or query (min length / filter) does not return matches for a single-character query. Worth verifying the backend route used by account-search and its min-length / fuzzy behaviour.

action_items: Verify account-search endpoint behaviour: ensure typing a short query (1–2 chars) returns matching accounts. The backend test confirms /api/accounts returns 12 accounts so data is present; the issue is in the dropdown search call used by the CREDIT panel.
(Optional) After 'Save Tags' succeeds, refetch the transaction list and summary so tab counts (Untagged/Tagged) update without a manual reload.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/accounting_transactions.py PATCH /tags marks status='tagged' if EITHER tags OR vendor_id are truthy — note that an empty {} tags dict passes the truthiness check only because '{}' is falsy in Python (so empty {} keeps status='untagged'). However a partial tags dict like {'expense_type': ''} would still set status='tagged' even though no real selection was made. Consider validating that at least one tag value is non-empty.

apply-account uses {$or: [{id}, {account_id}]} both for matching the account and for the $inc/$set — good. But the $inc uses round(amount, 2) while reading uses float(...); rounding only on write means tiny FP drift could accumulate on repeated apply/unapply cycles. Consider Decimal128 for monetary fields long-term.

ensure_indexes() is only invoked inside /sync. Since /sync is unreachable in Preview (no Zoho), the unique index would never be created until the first sync happens. Recommend calling ensure_indexes() at app startup (router include or @app.on_event('startup')) so the de-dup guarantee is always active. (Tests defensively create the index, hiding this in production.)

list_transactions does NOT filter the summary aggregation by the current page's filters — the tabs always show global counts. That is the intended behaviour per PRD; documenting here to avoid 'bug' reports later.
Proof download route depends on get_object returning (data, content_type); ensure object_storage returns a 404 (not 500) when the underlying blob is missing for hardening.

success_rate.frontend: ~80% (page + tabs + detail + save + sync graceful failure all OK; account-search 0 results & list refresh after save not verified)

seed_data_creation: Pre-seeded TEST-DEBIT-1 (Acme Glass Co, debit ₹12,500) and TEST-CREDIT-1 (Customer payment, credit ₹50,000) are present in accounting_transactions. After tests I reset both to status='untagged', proofs=[], tags={}, account_adjustment=null so subsequent reruns / FE testing start clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend route prefix /api/accounting/transactions. Seeds: TEST-DEBIT-1 id=3890df0b-0173-4924-9cc6-c6d698146011, TEST-CREDIT-1 id=23d2d0f7-f888-4316-b034-7d57a9f20985 (tenant nyla-air-water). /api/accounts returns {'data':[...]} (not 'items'). Unique index uniq_zoho_txn confirmed on (tenant_id, zoho_org_id, zoho_transaction_id) — tests create it defensively. Radix-UI Select options must be clicked via the portal listbox; using a generic '[role=option]' selector may grab a stale/placeholder option — when scripting the FE Save Tags flow, query options inside '[role=listbox]' after opening the select.
rca of the issue: No backend bugs. FE: 'Account opts = 0' on a 1-char query is most likely the search endpoint having a minimum-query-length or the FE not firing a request for very short strings; the data exists (12 accounts in /api/accounts). 'Tagged tab count not updating after save' could not be conclusively reproduced (test script may not have actually selected master values via radix Select); recommend manual verification of save→count update behaviour.
